featured.title: Session retrospective generator
featured.blurb: Paste a Claude Code transcript and the demo synthesises a retro: what went well, what slowed things down, learnings catalogue entries, and suggested skills to add. The same format my real retros take after every working session.

samples.label: Refactoring auth flow
samples.transcript:
[18:02] User: Need to refactor the auth flow. Currently we have JWTs in localStorage and a separate session check that hits /me on every page load. Want to consolidate.
[18:02] Claude: Let me read auth/jwt.ts and auth/session.ts first.
[18:04] Claude: Found three call sites for getCurrentUser() — pages/dashboard, pages/settings, components/Header. Suggest centralising in a SessionProvider with React Query for the /me check (cached 5min, refetch on focus).
[18:05] User: do it
[18:23] Claude: Done. Two things to flag:
 - The settings page was passing user.id into a useEffect dep array that's now provided by context — kept the dep but it'll only fire on user change now, which is correct.
 - There's a race in the existing logout handler I noticed while in there. Filed a note in TODO.md rather than fixing in this PR.
[18:24] User: good call. Run tests.
[18:25] Claude: 47 pass, 2 fail — both in auth.test.ts, both expect the old localStorage shape. Fixing.
[18:31] Claude: 49 pass. Anything else?
[18:32] User: ship it

samples.label: Debugging deploy issue
samples.transcript:
[09:14] User: prod deploy failing. CloudWatch is showing "ECONNREFUSED" from the worker after rollout.
[09:14] Claude: I'll start with the deploy diff and the worker logs around the failure window.
[09:18] Claude: Three suspects in the diff: env var rename (DB_URL → DATABASE_URL), a new feature flag, and a Dockerfile base bump. The error timing matches container start, so I'd look at the env rename first.
[09:19] User: yeah we did rename that
[09:21] Claude: Worker has a hard-coded reference to process.env.DB_URL in workers/jobs/index.ts:14. Missed it in the rename PR. Fix is one line.
[09:22] User: send the fix
[09:23] Claude: Done. Also grepped the repo for "DB_URL" — no other stragglers. Suggest adding the env var rename to the deploy checklist as a process change.
[09:24] User: ship and document.

samples.label: Building a feature from spec
samples.transcript:
[14:01] User: New feature — bulk export from the dashboard. Spec attached. Walk me through your plan first, don't write code yet.
[14:02] Claude: Read SPEC.md. Plan:
 1. Add a /export/jobs route, returns paginated job list + status.
 2. Add a "Bulk export" button to the dashboard table; opens a modal with format + date range.
 3. Worker job in workers/exports — generates CSV, uploads to S3, sends signed URL via email.
 4. Tests at each layer.
Two open questions: (a) Auth on the signed URL — same-domain only, or any-domain? (b) Should we rate-limit per user?
[14:04] User: same-domain only, rate-limit at 5/hour. Go.
[14:38] Claude: Ready for review. One thing I'm not happy with: the modal is pulling format options from a constant; should be a config so non-engineers can edit. Worth a follow-up?
[14:39] User: yes, file it. Anything else?
[14:40] Claude: Tests pass. Commit message draft attached.

projects.title: TeacherHub
projects.summary: Language-learning platform with a CEFR-aligned LLM-as-judge eval suite over its homework-generation pipeline.
projects.stack: Next.js 14, Mantine, Supabase (Postgres + RLS), Vercel, OpenAI GPT-4, Whisper, DeepL

projects.title: Claude CLI cockpit
projects.summary: Multi-window Electron cockpit for the Claude CLI: files touched, agents in use, tool calls, rejected calls, and structured review findings, all on one surface.

projects.title: BlobLife
projects.summary: Gamified habit-tracking app for people with ADHD. Four phases of the day, a blob companion that reflects how it's going, and a habitat that grows with consistency.

projects.title: Retro Claude
projects.summary: Skill and telemetry store on top of the Claude Code CLI: per-session retros classified against a personal ontology, telemetry over agent usage, friction, learnings, and gotchas.
projects.stack: Claude CLI, custom subagents and skills, SQLite telemetry
